case_title: PATRICK BRYAN HEGARTY VS. DCO MISSION BAY LP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,069.13 FILED BY HEGARTY, PATRICK BRYAN AS TO DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
OVER PAYMENT ON SC-100 $10, TRAN # W0523824O010, TAG # 037374 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEGARTY, PATRICK BRYAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JAMES CHANG. PLAINTIFF PATRICK HEGARTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ELINGTON DIAZ, (COMMUNITY DIRECTOR). BOTH PARTIES ORALLY STIPULATED TO A PRO TEM JUDGE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JAMES CHANG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEGARTY, PATRICK BRYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP $347.56 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $412.56, $147.56 REFUND OF REMAINING SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS $200.00 STATUTORY DAMAGES FOR BAD FAITH RETENTION OF DEPOSIT = TOTAL OF $347.56. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-28-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DCO MISSION BAY LP
